localizations.title: The Elite
localizations.hiddenObject_2: I think there's a photo under the driver's license.
localizations.code_1111: You cut the last wire and… The timer stops! Well done!
localizations.code_4058: You cut the last wire and… The timer stops! Well done!
localizations.code_4679: You cut the last wire and… The timer stops! Well done!
localizations.code_4760: You cut the last wire and… The timer stops! Well done!

localizations.code_6504: You cut the last wire and… The timer stops! Well done!
localizations.code_6534: You cut the last wire and… The timer stops! Well done!
localizations.code_6666: You have to defuse this bomb. There's not much time left.
localizations.code_9753: You cut the last wire and… The timer stops! Well done!
localizations.hint_4: It looks like the photo on the computer. Clearly he must have been 7 years old in 2009.
localizations.hint_21_first: Some cards seem to be missing. What's the Joker trying to tell us?
localizations.hint_21: 4 cards are missing: one per color. It will give you the closet's code.
localizations.hint_22: There must be some screws somewhere.
localizations.hint_35: It needs to be plugged in before anything else.
localizations.hint_42: This looks like the key for the lock on the bomb.
localizations.hint_47: There's a file on the screen. And the screen's background wallpaper is strange: 1 and 0 are perhaps positions?
localizations.hint_50: I think there's a photo under the driver's license.
localizations.hint_60: Perhaps the Morse code can help you to choose?
localizations.hint_63: Perhaps there is something behind it, the vent needs to be unscrewed.
localizations.hint_67: There are 4 groups: first Dash Dash Dash then Dot Dash Dot and then 2 others.
localizations.hint_73: Our suspect seems to love his child a lot. The code is most likely related.
localizations.hint_80_first: Some cards seem to be missing. What's the Joker trying to tell us?
localizations.hint_80: 4 cards are missing: one per color. It will give you the closet's code.
localizations.hint_85_first: You must need to lower some of these switches to obtain a red number, but which ones?
localizations.hint_85: The computer screen will help you choose the correct switches.
